creative_brief: Split-screen visual: left side shows a long highway with a refrigerated truck (distance overlay) fading into grey; right side shows a vibrant NSW pasture with cattle and a short dotted line to a FarmThru hub.
primary_text:
If your beef travelled 10x the distance before reaching the shelf, how fresh can it really be?

Supermarket meat sits in cold storage for weeks. The farmer is far away. You'll never know their name.

FarmThru is different. Grass-fed beef from named NSW farms goes direct to Brookvale. The farmer earns a fairer price.

No commitment. Collect from Brookvale, Mon to Fri.

See the general CSF risk warning + offer document.
headline: Beef that didn't travel 10x further
description: Farm-direct regenerative beef. Zero middlemen. Collect from Brookvale.
